title: Accommodation & Guidance
description: Choose from hotels close to the Two Holy Mosques, and connect with certified guides to accompany you during the rituals.
demoNotice: ⚠️ This is dummy data for presentation purposes. It will be replaced with real, live data when available.

fazahBanner.title: Fazah Service: A card connecting every pilgrim to the nearest guide or hotel reception
fazahBanner.desc: Learn how the QR card and instant emergency alert chain work.

sections.hotelsTitle: Hotels Near the Two Holy Mosques

labels.notFoundDesc: Could not find the requested hotel.

h1.name: Makkah Clock Royal Tower, A Fairmont Hotel
h1.description: Located directly adjacent to the Grand Mosque, this iconic hotel offers panoramic views of the Haram and Kaaba from most rooms, featuring luxury services and direct access.

h2.name: Swissôtel Al Maqam Makkah
h2.description: A luxury hotel combining Swiss hospitality with local character, just steps away from the Haram courtyards via covered corridors for guests.

h3.name: Hilton Suites Makkah
h3.description: An ideal choice for families with spacious suites and a kitchenette in each room, offering regular shuttle service to the Haram throughout the day.

h4.name: Dar Al Tawhid InterContinental Makkah
h4.description: One of Makkah's oldest and most prestigious hotels, offering direct views of the Holy Kaaba from its restaurants and suites, with 24/7 concierge service.

h5.name: Mövenpick Anwar Al Madinah
h5.description: Located in the heart of the central area in Madinah, directly overlooking the courtyards of the Prophet's Holy Mosque, with inclusive buffet breakfast.

h6.name: Dar Al Iman InterContinental Madinah
h6.description: Connected by a direct covered walkway to the Prophet's Mosque courtyard, making it easy to access prayers in time without direct sun exposure.

h7.name: Pullman Zamzam Madinah
h7.description: A modern, reasonably priced hotel offering partial views of the Prophet's Mosque, featuring a fitness center and diverse restaurants to suit all tastes.

g1.name: Sheikh Abdullah Al-Harbi
g1.specialty: Comprehensive jurisprudential guidance for Umrah rituals

g2.name: Mr. Mohammed Al-Zahrani
g2.specialty: Accompanying Umrah groups and Tawaf guidance

g4.name: Sheikh Khalid Al-Otaibi
g4.specialty: Historical tours of the Prophet's Mosque and landmarks

g6.name: Ms. Hind Al-Dossari
g6.specialty: Accompanying elderly and people of determination
